edgeCases: Worktrees disabled: single-checkout flow unchanged, no .worktrees/ created
Ignore-list sync is idempotent across wizard and migrate re-runs
Clean text merge that fails validate is treated as a semantic conflict
Spec contradictions across in-flight worktrees are blocked pre-merge
Low-confidence Steward resolutions escalate to the user, never applied silently
Dirty main aborts centinela merge before git is touched
Restart with existing worktree resumes in place (run start from main checkout)
Merge Steward agent auto-dispatch is a documented v1.1 follow-up; merge exits with the hint path
